summary: A 2004 State Department cable from Embassy Ashgabat describes a Turkmen NGO called the Union of UFOlogists, originally formed to study life on other planets, which had shifted to practical civic work such as business registration and humanitarian aid distribution. The document reports no confirmed UFO sightings in Turkmenistan, noting officials had occasionally consulted the group's president about unexplained occurrences in Turkmen airspace.
